overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character in dark wizard robes exploring a snowy medieval village with stone cottages and thatched roofs. The character walks through cobblestone streets, surveys the mountain backdrop, and enters a cottage.

scene_state.functional_zone: village street with thatched stone cottages

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path through the village, approaching the central hall building

entered.detail: stone cottage with steep thatched roof and wooden door
tall wooden post with lantern on top
large rocky mountain face forming the village backdrop
wet cobblestone street with patches of snow

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone street in a medieval village, passing stone cottages with thatched roofs. The mountain cliff backdrop looms in the distance under an overcast winter sky.

events.description: character stops forward movement and begins rotating to survey the surrounding buildings

agents.ego_description: standing in the village center and rotating to look at different buildings, the mountain backdrop, and distant structures

notable_agents.action: distant villager standing near a building in the background

entered.detail: large building with distinctive steep triangular thatched roof
stone monument or well structure in the village center
green glowing magical marker near stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character pauses in the village center to observe the surroundings, revealing a large triangular-roofed hall and a distant villager. The camera pans to show different angles of the medieval architecture against the mountain backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: village edge with mountain cliff and forest

events.description: moving from village center toward the mountain perimeter with denser leafless trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of the village toward the mountain cliffs, passing stone perimeter walls and leafless winter trees

entered.detail: rocky cliff face with patches of snow
low stone wall marking the village boundary
dense cluster of bare winter trees

segments.scene_description: The character explores the village perimeter, walking past stone walls toward the imposing mountain cliff face. Leafless winter trees line the path as the character surveys the edge of the settlement.

events.description: character approaches the wooden door and enters the cottage, transitioning from outdoor village to interior space

agents.ego_description: walking up to a small stone cottage and entering through the wooden door

entered.detail: small stone cottage with steep thatched roof and wooden door
heavy wooden plank door with metal hinges
brass lantern mounted on the cottage wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a small stone cottage, walks up to the wooden door, and enters the building, transitioning from the snowy village exterior to the dark interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy medieval village that transitions from an open exploration of the settlement to the enclosed interior of a cottage. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone street lined with thatched-roof stone cottages under a heavy, overcast winter sky. As the character pauses in the village center, the camera pans to reveal a large triangular-roofed hall and a distant villager against the looming mountain cliff backdrop. The scene then shifts toward the village perimeter, moving past stone walls and leafless winter trees as the character approaches the imposing cliff face. Finally, the camera follows the character to a small stone cottage, moving through the wooden door to transition from the cold, snowy exterior into a dark interior.
